summary: Iteration 39 - Phase 2 Financial Control System Testing Complete. Tested Multi Tax Engine (6 tax types, PPN calculator, PPh 21 progressive calculator), Financial Consistency Checker (6 check types, full report), and Auto Journal Engine (21 templates, preview). Backend: 41/41 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All 3 tabs working correctly with proper data display and calculations.

issues: Tax result box and PPh 21 result could have slightly better contrast for readability on dark background

MULTI_TAX_ENGINE.test_get_tax_types: PASS - Returns all 6 tax types (PPN, PPNBM, PPH21, PPH22, PPH23, PPH4_2)
MULTI_TAX_ENGINE.test_tax_types_have_required_fields: PASS - Each tax type has code, name, default_rate, category, description
MULTI_TAX_ENGINE.test_calculate_invalid_tax_code: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid tax code
MULTI_TAX_ENGINE.test_pph21_no_tax_if_below_ptkp: PASS - No tax when income < PTKP

CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_check_journal_balance: PASS - Checks debit=credit for all journals
CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_check_trial_balance: PASS - Checks total debit=credit in trial balance
CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_check_ar_journal: PASS - Compares AR balance vs journal
CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_check_ap_journal: PASS - Compares AP balance vs journal
CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_check_invalid_type: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid check type
CONSISTENCY_CHECKER.test_full_consistency_report: PASS - Runs all 6 checks, returns report with status

AUTO_JOURNAL_ENGINE.test_template_has_required_fields: PASS - Each template has code, name, debit/credit accounts
AUTO_JOURNAL_ENGINE.test_get_single_template: PASS - Returns template with derived account details
AUTO_JOURNAL_ENGINE.test_preview_with_zero_tax: PASS - Works with zero tax amount
AUTO_JOURNAL_ENGINE.test_get_account_mapping: PASS - Returns account key mapping and defaults

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tax_tab_multi_tax_engine: PASS - Shows tax calculator, PPh 21 calculator, tax types table
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.pph21_calculator: PASS - Progressive PPh 21 calculation with PTKP
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tax_types_table: PASS - Shows all 6 tax types with rates and categories
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.consistency_checker_tab: PASS - Run check button working, shows 6 checks with status icons
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.consistency_report_display: PASS - Shows pass/warning/fail status for each check
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.auto_journal_tab: PASS - Template selector, amount inputs, preview button working
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.journal_preview_display: PASS - Shows debit/credit entries, balanced status badge
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.template_list_display: PASS - Shows 21 templates grouped by category (SALES, PURCHASE, AR/AP, INVENTORY)

critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints properly protected with authentication (get_current_user)
Consistency checker correctly uses require_permission for accounting view
Tax calculations are accurate with proper inclusive/exclusive logic
PPh 21 progressive rate brackets match Indonesian tax law 2024
seed_data_used: Used existing production data - consistency checker detected real inconsistencies (trial_balance selisih 40,500, stock_movement 8 items, ar_journal selisih 267,500) which is expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Financial Control System fully tested. Multi Tax Engine with 6 Indonesian tax types and progressive PPh 21 calculator. Consistency Checker runs 6 validation checks - note that current data has some inconsistencies detected (expected for real ERP data). Auto Journal Engine provides 21 templates for automatic journal generation. All endpoints return proper data structure and UI displays correctly.

notes.consistency_checker_findings: The system correctly detected some data inconsistencies: trial_balance has 40,500 difference, 8 stock items have discrepancies, AR journal has 267,500 difference. This is EXPECTED behavior - the checker is working correctly and detecting real issues in the data.
notes.journal_preview_balanced: Auto Journal preview correctly shows balanced entries with Debit = Credit for all templates tested
